Value of cnc_statinfo
Priority State of CNC Remarks
Series 30i (NOTE 3) Series 15i (NOTE 4)
1 emergency = 1 EMERGENCY Emergency stopped
2 alarm = 1 ALARM In alarm condition
3 run = 3 run = 2 or 13 OPERATE Operating
4 run = 1 or 2 or 4 run = 0 or 1 or 3 or 4 or 5 or 6 or 7 SUSPEND Suspended
5 run = 0 run = 8 STOP Stopped
6 run = other than above values UNKNOWN Unknown
Highest priority is 1.
Following are the details of the value of cnc_statinfo. (For the details of other values, refer to the
specification document of FOCAS2 function.)

Item

Under manual mode or under cutter radius
compensation outside comer

: the -th axis of the servo axes (0 to 23)

Example
Given the following:
Machine Name: Machine001, Signal Name: Servo Speed, Servo axis number n: 5, CNC Path: 1

Signal definition: Machine001Servo Speed5_path1
